boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: REL-AST-081 execution release matches material (AS-44), quantity band (0-20L covers 18L), facility (Facility R9), PO reference (PO-AST-081), and hazard controls (active cabinet/handler) before PO execution per STD-AST-081-P policy requirements.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: REL-AST-081 directly covers AS-44, 0-20L band, Facility R9, PO-AST-081, and active cabinet/handler controls, satisfying STD-AST-081-P exact boundary requirements before execution.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Execution release precedes PO execution temporally; scope covers all five required matching elements; REL-AST-081 is the controlling execution authority, not WARN-AST-081 (which is a generic warning, not a execution-blocker).

final_answer: Allow. REL-AST-081 execution release directly satisfies STD-AST-081-P policy: it covers AS-44 solvent, 0-20 liter band (encompassing the 18 liters in PO-AST-081), Facility R9, PO-AST-081, and active cabinet/handler controls before execution. All five required matching elements are present and current. WARN-AST-081 is a generic warning, not an execution-blocker. The action boundary is closed by exact source evidence.
